en: You're using Bonetti's defense against me, huh? I thought it fitting considering the rocky terrain
ja: 険しい地形を考えると適切だと思った。当然だ。
zhTW: 考慮到崎嶇的地形，我覺得很合適。當然。
vi: Toi nghi no phu hop voi dia hinh go ghe. Duong nhien.

en: Naturally, you must expect me to attack with Capifeiro. Naturally, but I find that tibble cancers are Capifeiro. Don't you?
ko: 너는 내가 카포 페로로 공격할 거라고 예상하고 있겠지. 당연하지.
ja: カポ・フェロで攻撃すると予想してるだろう。当然だ。
zhTW: 你一定預計我會用卡波費羅進攻。當然。
vi: Anh chac doan toi se tan cong bang Capo Ferro. Duong nhien.

en: Unless the enemy has a study he's a gripper Which I have
ja: 敵が研究していなければ、彼はグリッパだ。
zhTW: 除非敵人有研究過，否則他就是個門外漢。
vi: Tru khi doi thu co nghien cuu, han chi la tay mo.

en: You are wonderful. Thank you. I've worked hard to come sir. I admitted you are better than I am
ja: 認めよう、君は俺より上だ。なぜ笑ってる？
zhTW: 我承認，你比我強。那你為什麼在笑？
vi: Toi thua nhan, anh gioi hon toi. Vay sao anh lai cuoi?

en: Why are you smiling because I know something you don't know and what is that? I am not left-handed
ko: 내가 너가 모르는 걸 알고 있으니까.
ja: それは何だ？俺は左利きじゃない。すごいな。
zhTW: 那是什麼？我不是左撇子。你太厲害了。
vi: La gi vay? Toi khong thuan tay trai. Anh that tuyet voi.
